__fixture__.name: repair_card_policy_bundle_request_refresh
__fixture__.scenario: Policy-gated repair card promoted from a diagnostics card after the active policy bundle slid past its freshness floor and the offline-grace window started counting down. The card requests a fresh policy-bundle pull through the configured distribution path; scope is scope_policy_bundle_only because the action's effect lands on the signed bundle source. Authority is policy_bundle_signer_authority because only the bundle signer's distribution path can publish a refreshed bundle; consent is admin_co_sign_required so an org admin co-signs the refresh request. Cites the policy bundle, the transport posture, and the admin-audit packet the refresh will publish.

what_changes_sentence: Asks the org's signed-policy distribution path for a fresh policy bundle so the active bundle, its policy epoch, and any narrowed managed capabilities re-resolve to the current source.
where_it_applies_sentence: Applies to the org's signed policy bundle source only; the local bundle cache and the entitlement snapshot are re-resolved as a downstream consequence, not as the primary effect.

evidence_links.evidence_note: Active bundle whose distribution freshness has passed the configured floor.
Posture object naming the bound active_policy_bundle_ref and policy_epoch_ref.
Audit packet the refresh request will publish; cites the requesting user and the co-signing admin.
